alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with experience scaling global commercial operations and leading transformation programs; demonstrated cross-functional leadership and stakeholder management
alignments.job_requirement: Lead a team of Partner Solution Engineers as well as work directly with Snowflake's Partner Management, Sales, Pre-Sales, Marketing, and Services teams

alignments.candidate_evidence: Extensive experience with transformation programs, process design, and execution; product operations background with requirements logic design and rollout leadership
alignments.job_requirement: Drive strategic customer and partner engagements in partnership with Sales, Solution Engineering and GTM teams; build repeatable reference architectures and frameworks

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategic operations and transformation leadership at Google; stakeholder management and cross-functional coordination demonstrated
alignments.job_requirement: Act as escalation point for customers, sales teams, and product leadership; drive product gaps and roadmap processes as the Voice of the Field

gaps.gap: Limited pre-sales or customer-facing technical sales background; product operations background differs from vendor-facing solution engineering
gaps.mitigation: Strategic operations and transformation experience demonstrates complex problem-solving and stakeholder management; hands-on role-coach style described in JD is compatible with product operations leadership; cross-functional collaboration skills are transferable

gaps.gap: No stated hands-on expertise with SQL, data warehouse, or BI technologies; background is commercial operations, not technical product
gaps.mitigation: JD says 'equivalent experience preferred' for CS/engineering degree; strategic understanding of data platforms and ability to learn technical domains demonstrated through product operations work; can rely on team for deep technical details

gaps.gap: No direct consulting background or classic case-team experience; limited exposure to vendor technology integration architecture (Tableau, Informatica, Thoughtspot, Qlik, Fivetran, etc.)
gaps.mitigation: Strategic programs and transformation experience include working with vendors and technology partners; learning curve manageable for someone with strong operator and GTM leadership skills

gaps.gap: APJ regional leadership and partner ecosystem management are not core to stated Google Devices and Services background
gaps.mitigation: Partner strategy and multi-tier ecosystem development are operational and process-design problems; cross-functional orchestration skills from transformation work are applicable

output.level_rationale: RVP title with 4+ years direct line management required, P&L ownership, regional ecosystem leadership across four partner tiers, and reporting to VP of APJ SE indicates L6. JD explicitly requires 15+ years industry experience, establishing senior management expectations.
output.summary: RVP, APJ Partner SE is a clear L6 leadership role (15+ years required, direct line management, P&L, regional partner ecosystem ownership). Candidate has strong strategic operations and transformation leadership, demonstrated cross-functional collaboration, and GTM stakeholder management from Google tenure, which align with the team-building and partner-engagement aspects. However, the core gap is lack of pre-sales, customer-facing technical sales, or hands-on data/SQL expertise required by the JD. While the operations and transformation background demonstrates relevant leadership and problem-solving, the shift from product operations to vendor-facing partner solution engineering is substantial and not a natural family fit. Gaps in technical SQL/data-warehouse knowledge and consulting/architecture vendor experience are high-severity but mitigatable given the "equivalent experience preferred" language and the role's emphasis on team leadership and strategic execution.
uncertainties: Snowflake company size/stage not stated in JD; 'fast-growing' and global presence suggest scale but confirmation would improve confidence
Depth of candidate's experience with cloud architecture (AWS, Azure, GCP) and SaaS platforms not specified in profile
Candidate's exposure to or ability to rapidly develop expertise in SQL, data warehousing, and BI vendor technologies unclear
No indication whether candidate has prior exposure to partner ecosystem models (GSIs, CSPs, DCPs) or has worked in vendor sales/pre-sales capacity
